---
title: "Packages"
format: html
tbl-colwidths: [25,10,65]
---

A list of tools and R/Bioconductor packages that I have contributed to, either as a developer/maintainer or a occasional contributor:

| Package |  | Description |
|:---------|:----|:-------------|
| [**EMMA**](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/EMMA) | ![](img/EMMA-logo.png) | Achieve fully reproducible and provenance-aware pathway analyses |
| [**DeeDeeExperiment**](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/DeeDeeExperiment) |  | An S4 class for integrating and managing omics data analysis results |
|[**iSEEfier**](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/iSEEfier)| ![](img/iSEEfier.png) | Streamline the creation of initial states for starting an iSEE instance |
|[**NeuroVar**](https://github.com/omicscodeathon/neurovar)| ![](img/neurovar-logo.png) | Gene expression and variation data visualization for biomarkers of neurological diseases |
|[**exvar**](https://github.com/omicscodeathon/exvar)| ![](img/exvar-logo.png) | Gene expression and genetic variation data analysis and visualization |
|[**ROHStats**](https://github.com/NajlaAbassi/ROHStats)|  | Fast and easy ROH statistics and visualization from PLINK outputs |
